title: archidendron havilandii
intro: Archidendron havilandii, also known as the Haviland's tree or the Batai tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Archidendron havilandii include the potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
